annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Utah Code Ann. Sec. 15-1-4, currently 5.51% (as of January 1, 2026). (federal postjudgment interest rate as of January 1 of the year the judgment is entered) + 2%. The "federal postjudgment interest rate" is defined by Sec. 15-1-4(1) as the… Simple interest. Contract judgments (Sec. 15-1-4(2)(a)): a judgment rendered on a lawful contract conforms to the contract and bears the interest rate agreed by the… Verify the current value at utcourts.gov; not legal advice.
